steps.title: Show formation order
steps.content: The goal is not just to define supercontinents; it is to emphasize the order in which Vaalbara and Euramerica formed. The notes show Vaalbara formed about 3.6 billion years ago and Euramerica about 300 million years ago.

steps.title: Reject nonsequencing choices
steps.content: A describes the general supercontinent cycle without naming the two examples. C gives only Vaalbara's date, and D only defines both as supercontinents. Only the remaining choice states the relative order. The answer is B.
